Package global.thalion.ttio.transport

Class PacketHeader

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.transport.PacketHeader
public final class PacketHeader extends Object
24-byte packet header for the TTI-O transport format. See docs/transport-spec.md §3.1.

Little-endian wire encoding: 2-byte magic "TI", uint8 version, uint8 packet type, uint16 flags, uint16 dataset id, uint32 AU sequence, uint32 payload length, uint64 timestamp.

Cross-language equivalents: Python ttio.transport.packets.PacketHeader, Objective-C TTIOTransportPacketHeader.
